case_title: TONIQUE LEMORIA-HARRIET THEARD VS. GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-22-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TONIQUE LEMORIA-HARRIET THEARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EDGARDO PALACIAS, DRIVER/DISPATCH. THE DEFENDANT PRESENTED THE PLAINTIFF WITH A CHECK FOR $2000 IN COURT. THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW THE CHECK TO CLEAR THE BANK. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY., INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. HEARING IS HELD. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON MARCH 22, 2022 AS TO DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC. IS DEEMED TO BE INVALID SERVICE. AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS CRYSTAL TARIN CORTES WAS SERVED AT 1103 S. CENTRAL AVE., GLENDALE CA 91204. THE CORRECT ADDRESS FOR SERVICE IS 12411 OSBORNE ST. UNIT 23, PACOIMA, CA 91331, PURSUANT TO THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO RE-SERVE DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY. INC. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW DOES NOT NEED TO BE RE-SERVED AND MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM. PLAINTIFF TONIQUE LEMORA-HARRIET THEARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JESUS PONCE, MANAGER. DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC., IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JESUS PONCE, MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-09-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TONIQUE LEMORIA-HARRIET THEARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER APR-5-2023 HEARING. PARTIES REVISED SETTLEMENT AMOUNT TO $2000. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT PROGRESS REPORT, SET FOR MAY 09, 2023, AT 3:30, IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY ENTER JUDGMENT DECISION FOR PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $5000. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-04-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TONIQUE LEMORA-HARRIET THEARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JESUS PONCE, MANAGER. DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC., IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED AS TO DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATRE SECURITY, INC. COURT ADDRESSES PROOF OF SERVICE ISSUE AS TO DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC. WITH PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT THIS MATTER CAN NOT PROCEED WITH THE HEARING WITHOUT PROPER NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES OF THE HEARING DATE AND THE CLAIMS AGAINST THEM OR PLAINTIFF MAY DISMISS DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY INC. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT WANT TO DISMISS DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-25-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TONIQUE LEMORA-HARRIET THEARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JESUS PONCE, MANAGER. DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC., IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEC-19-2022 IS INVALID. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES DEFENDANT ATF PRIVATE SECURITY, INC. TO MOVE FORWARD TO TRIAL WITH NO OBJECTION BY THE DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREBY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2,500. PROGRESS REPORT SET FOR APR-25, 2023 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT 506. IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE, THEN CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ("DWP"). IF THERE IS AN APPEARANCE, HEARING WILL BE CONDUCTED FOR JUDGEMENT DECISION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
